#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Checklist

*[Place an '[x]' (no spaces) in all applicable fields. Please remove unrelated fields.]*

- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`)
- [ ] All commit messages follow conventional commit format
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive` has been run locally
- [ ] Variables added or changed are documented with a `description` field in `variables.tf`
- [ ] Outputs added or changed are documented with a `description` field in `outputs.tf`
- [ ] `.tftest.hcl` tests added or updated to cover the change
- [ ] No hardcoded account IDs, ARNs, or secrets introduced
